mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_devices (id, user_id, fcm_token, device_type, device_name, language, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{fcmToken}, #{deviceType}, #{deviceName}, #{language}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_devices WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_active = true ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM user_devices WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND fcm_token = #{fcmToken}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_devices WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
